techs.name: Gathering
techs.quote: Open the fruits and you'll find seeds inside... In the soil to make more fruits!

techs.name: Mining
techs.quote: Underground you'll find even stronger rocks than the one's we've been using before.

techs.name: Animal Husbandry
techs.quote: Instead of chasing our food, we can build fenses and trap them so we don't have to chase em all the time.

techs.name: Writing
techs.quote: By engraving our words to clay tablets. Our words, stories and life lessons can be forever immortalised for generations to come.

techs.name: Farming
techs.quote: Open the fruits and you'll find seeds inside... In the soil to make more fruits!

techs.name: Carpentry
techs.quote: Logs from trees turn out to make great house building material.

techs.name: Bronze Working
techs.quote: By combining weaker metals such as copper and tin, we can create bronze, a much stronger metal which can be used for spear tips.

techs.name: Archery
techs.quote: Instead of chasing our food, we can build fenses and trap them so we don't have to chase em all the time.

techs.name: Philosophy
techs.quote: The human mind is vast and complicated. By learning more about ourselves, we can understand our strengths and flaws as a society.

techs.name: Construction
techs.quote: Now we can combine both tougher and stronger building material and human innovation. We can build great towering structures.
